seoTitle: Kiwi Size Chart and Recommender App Tutorial for Shopify
metaDescription: New to the Kiwi Size Chart and Recommender app? This beginner tutorial covers installing it on Shopify and setting up size charts and recommendations.
intro: Sizing confusion is one of the most common reasons for returns in online apparel and accessories, and the Kiwi Size Chart and Recommender app aims to fix that with clearer size guidance and personalized recommendations. This tutorial walks through installing the app on Shopify, customizing size charts for your products, and setting up recommendations. It's designed for beginners setting up the app for the first time.

steps.heading: Install the Kiwi app on Shopify
steps.body: Add the Kiwi Size Chart and Recommender app to your Shopify store from the app listing to begin setup.

steps.heading: Customize size charts for your products
steps.body: Build out size charts tailored to each product category, since accurate sizing information is the core value this app provides.

steps.heading: Set up product recommendations
steps.body: Configure the recommendation features so customers get suggestions based on their size and product preferences.

steps.heading: Follow optimization tips as a beginner
steps.body: Review the app's settings to make sure size charts and recommendations are displaying correctly before your store goes live with them.

faq.question: Does the Kiwi app help reduce returns on Shopify?
faq.answer: Providing clearer size charts and personalized recommendations is meant to help customers choose the right size, which can reduce size-related returns.

faq.question: Is the Kiwi Size Chart and Recommender app beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, this tutorial is designed specifically for beginners setting up the app for the first time on their Shopify store.

faq.question: Can I customize size charts for different product types?
faq.answer: Yes, the app allows you to set up size charts tailored to different products rather than using one generic chart for everything.

faq.question: Does the app use automation or AI?
faq.answer: The app leverages automated size recommendations to streamline the shopping experience and reduce manual work for merchants.
